tools.name: transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe one audio file to a clean transcript. A one-shot op on the bare-metal (Metal) host: whisper large-v3 in, an ACK manifest out (where the transcript landed, not the text). An optional prompt biases whisper toward the right names/places/terms; omit it for the no-prompt path.

file.description: path to an audio file (m4a, wav, mp3, aac, flac)

prompt.description: OPTIONAL per-bento context (names, places, terms) to bias whisper; omit for the no-prompt path

tools.name: health
tools.description: Report the magpie daemon's liveness. The watch-folder daemon serves only GET /health on :8092 (transcription is the one-shot CLI op above, not an HTTP call).
